name: Wilcoxon Rank-Sum Marker Gene Detection

groupby.guidance: The obs column with cluster or cell type labels to find markers for.

method.guidance: Statistical test. Wilcoxon rank-sum is the standard for scRNA-seq marker detection. t-test is faster but assumes normality. logreg (logistic regression) can find markers that jointly discriminate.

n_genes.guidance: Number of top genes to report per group.

use_raw.guidance: Use raw counts (from adata.raw) for testing. Should be true — DE should be computed on the full gene set, not just HVGs.

corr_method.guidance: Multiple testing correction method. Benjamini-Hochberg (FDR) is standard.

outputs.marker_genes: adata.uns['rank_genes_groups'] containing names, scores, pvals, pvals_adj, logfoldchanges per group

validation.check: Each cluster should have at least 5 significant markers (pval_adj < 0.05, logfc > 1.0). Clusters without clear markers may need to be merged or may represent doublets.

notes: This is for finding CLUSTER MARKERS — genes that distinguish one cluster from all others. For CROSS-CONDITION DE (disease vs. healthy), use pseudobulk methods (DESeq2/edgeR) instead.
